case_title: KENDALL WRIGHT ET AL VS. MATTHEW WILLIAM LAWRENCE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-31-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-31-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF KENDAL WRIGHT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ALICIA FILLERUP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTHEW WILLIAM LAWRENCE IS NOT PRESENT. COURTCALL WAS ACTIVATED DURING THE PROCEEDINGS BUT DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
RETURN MAIL- REJECT LETTER - UNABLE TO FORWARD SENT TO PLAINTIFF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, KENDALL FILLERUP, ALICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, MATTHEW WILLIAM $2,116.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,201.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFFS KENDAL WRIGHT AND ALICIA FILLERUP JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY.
